# CLAUDE.md

This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.

## Project Overview

**Imnuri AZS-MR** — a Kotlin Multiplatform hymnal app for the Seventh-day Adventist Reform Movement church. Displays hymns with lyrics, music sheet images, MP3 playback, favorites, search, categories, and supports 4 languages (Romanian, Italian, German, English) with runtime locale switching, theming, and dark mode.

- **Application ID**: `ml.dannyb.imnuriazsmr`
- **Package**: `ml.dannyb.imnuriazsmr`
- **Platforms**: Android, Desktop (JVM), iOS, WasmJs
- **Language**: 100% Kotlin (no Java)

## Quick Start — Build & Test

```bash
# Android
./gradlew :composeApp:assembleDebug           # Debug APK
./gradlew :composeApp:assembleRelease         # Release APK (needs keystore env vars)

# Desktop
./gradlew :composeApp:desktopJar              # Runnable JAR
./gradlew :composeApp:run                     # Run desktop app

# Tests (100 total: 53 domain + 47 data)
./gradlew :shared:domain:desktopTest          # Domain unit tests
./gradlew :shared:data:desktopTest            # Data integration tests

# Clean
./gradlew clean
```

### Build Status

| Platform | Status | Notes |
|----------|--------|-------|
| Android  | Builds | 22MB APK, targetSdk 35, ProGuard/R8 enabled |
| Desktop  | Builds + Runs | 450x800 window, macOS/Windows/Linux |
| iOS      | Builds + Runs | Tested on iPad, Xcode project in `iosApp/` |
| WasmJs   | Builds | `compileKotlinWasmJs` passes for all modules |

## Architecture

4-layer clean architecture with unidirectional dependency flow:

```
domain  <--  data  <--  presentation  <--  ui
(models,     (SQLDelight, (Decompose       (Compose MP
 repos,       Ktor,        components,      screens,
 use cases)   Koin DI)     navigation)      Material 3)
```

### Module Dependency Graph

```
composeApp (platform entry points)
  └── shared:ui (Compose screens, theme, localization)
        └── shared:presentation (Decompose components, state)
              └── shared:data (database, network, DI modules)
                    └── shared:domain (pure Kotlin models, interfaces)
```

## Module Guide

### `shared/domain` — Pure Kotlin
Domain models (`Hymn`, `Category`, `UserPreferences`, `HymnLanguage`, `AppTheme`, `DarkModePreference`), repository interfaces (`HymnRepository`, `CategoryRepository`, `PreferencesRepository`, `MediaRepository`), and use cases. No platform dependencies.

### `shared/data` — Platform-Specific Implementations
SQLDelight database (`.sq` files), Ktor HTTP client, multiplatform-settings preferences, repository implementations. Contains `expect/actual` declarations for `DriverFactory`, `BundledDataLoader`, `PlatformMediaPlayer`, `PlatformFileStorage`. Koin `DataModule` and `PlatformDataModule` live here.

### `shared/presentation` — Decompose Navigation
Decompose components managing screen state and navigation. `RootComponent` (stack navigation) and `MainComponent` (bottom tab navigation). Pure Kotlin — no Compose dependency. Koin `PresentationModule` lives here.

### `shared/ui` — Compose Multiplatform

package ml.dannyb.imnuriazsmr.migration

import android.content.Context
import android.content.SharedPreferences
import android.preference.PreferenceManager
import android.util.Log
import ml.dannyb.imnuriazsmr.domain.model.AppTheme
import ml.dannyb.imnuriazsmr.domain.model.DarkModePreference
import ml.dannyb.imnuriazsmr.domain.model.HymnLanguage
import ml.dannyb.imnuriazsmr.domain.repository.PreferencesRepository

/**
 * Handles migration of data from the old Realm-based app to the new KMP/SQLDelight app.
 *
 * Migrates from old SharedPreferences (PreferenceManager default prefs):
 * - hymns_language, app_language, night_mode, current_theme, hymn_font_size
 *
 * Limitations:
 * - Favorites were stored ONLY in Realm (not SharedPreferences). Since we do not add
 *   Realm as a dependency, favorites cannot be migrated automatically. Users will need
 *   to re-mark their favorites in the new app.
 */
class LegacyDataMigration(private val context: Context) {

    companion object {
        private const val TAG = "LegacyDataMigration"
        private const val MIGRATION_PREFS = "legacy_migration"
        private const val KEY_MIGRATION_COMPLETE = "migration_complete"

        // Old app SharedPreferences keys (from old PreferencesController.kt)
        private const val OLD_KEY_HYMNS_LANGUAGE = "hymns_language"
        private const val OLD_KEY_APP_LANGUAGE = "app_language"
        private const val OLD_KEY_NIGHT_MODE = "night_mode"
        private const val OLD_KEY_CURRENT_THEME = "current_theme"
        private const val OLD_KEY_HYMN_FONT_SIZE = "hymn_font_size"
        private const val OLD_KEY_DATABASE_POPULATED = "database_populated"

        /**
         * Maps old theme string names to new AppTheme values.
         *
         * Old themes (stored as "AppTheme.{Name}" or "DarkTheme"):
         *   DarkTheme, AppTheme.Transparent, AppTheme.Red, AppTheme.Pink,
         *   AppTheme.Purple, AppTheme.DeepPurple, AppTheme.Indigo, AppTheme.LightBlue,
         *   AppTheme.Blue, AppTheme.Cyan, AppTheme.Teal, AppTheme.Green,
         *   AppTheme.LightGreen, AppTheme.Lime, AppTheme.Yellow, AppTheme.Amber,
         *   AppTheme.Orange, AppTheme.DeepOrange, AppTheme.Brown, AppTheme.Gray,
         *   AppTheme.BlueGrey
         *
         * New themes (8):
         *   SACRED_BLUE, ROYAL_PURPLE, FOREST_GREEN, WARM_AMBER, ROSE, SLATE, EARTH, MIDNIGHT
         */
        fun mapOldThemeToNew(oldTheme: String): AppTheme = when (oldTheme) {
            "AppTheme.Blue", "AppTheme.LightBlue", "AppTheme.Indigo" -> AppTheme.SACRED_BLUE
            "AppTheme.Purple", "AppTheme.DeepPurple" -> AppTheme.ROYAL_PURPLE
            "AppTheme.Green", "AppTheme.LightGreen", "AppTheme.Teal",
            "AppTheme.Lime", "AppTheme.Cyan" -> AppTheme.FOREST_GREEN
            "AppTheme.Yellow", "AppTheme.Amber", "AppTheme.Orange" -> AppTheme.WARM_AMBER
            "AppTheme.Red", "AppTheme.Pink", "AppTheme.DeepOrange" -> AppTheme.ROSE
            "AppTheme.Gray", "AppTheme.BlueGrey", "AppTheme.Transparent" -> AppTheme.SLATE
            "AppTheme.Brown" -> AppTheme.EARTH
            "DarkTheme" -> AppTheme.MIDNIGHT
            else -> AppTheme.DEFAULT
        }
    }

    private val migrationPrefs: SharedPreferences =
        context.getSharedPreferences(MIGRATION_PREFS, Context.MODE_PRIVATE)

    /**
     * Checks whether legacy data migration should run.
     * Returns true if:
     * - Migration has not been completed yet, AND
     * - Old SharedPreferences contain the "database_populated" key (indicating the old app was used)
     */
    fun shouldMigrate(): Boolean {
        if (migrationPrefs.getBoolean(KEY_MIGRATION_COMPLETE, false)) {
            return false
        }
        val oldPrefs = getOldPreferences()
        return oldPrefs.contains(OLD_KEY_DATABASE_POPULATED)

import com.google.firebase.analytics.FirebaseAnalytics
import com.google.firebase.analytics.ktx.logEvent

class FirebaseAnalyticsService(
    private val firebaseAnalytics: FirebaseAnalytics,
    private val crashlytics: FirebaseCrashlytics
) : AnalyticsService {

    override fun logEvent(name: String, params: Map<String, Any>) {
        firebaseAnalytics.logEvent(name) {
            params.forEach { (key, value) ->
                when (value) {
                    is String -> param(key, value)
                    is Int -> param(key, value.toLong())
                    is Long -> param(key, value)
                    is Double -> param(key, value)
                    is Boolean -> param(key, value.toString())
                    else -> param(key, value.toString())
                }
            }
        }
    }

    override fun setUserId(id: String?) {
        firebaseAnalytics.setUserId(id)
        crashlytics.setUserId(id ?: "")
    }

    override fun setUserProperty(name: String, value: String?) {
        firebaseAnalytics.setUserProperty(name, value)
        crashlytics.setCustomKey(name, value ?: "")
    }
}

# CLAUDE.md

This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.

## Project Overview

**Imnuri AZS-MR** — a Kotlin Multiplatform hymnal app for the Seventh-day Adventist Reform Movement church. Displays hymns with lyrics, music sheet images, MP3 playback, favorites, search, categories, and supports 4 languages (Romanian, Italian, German, English) with runtime locale switching, theming, and dark mode.

- **Application ID**: `ml.dannyb.imnuriazsmr`
- **Package**: `ml.dannyb.imnuriazsmr`
- **Platforms**: Android, Desktop (JVM), iOS, WasmJs
- **Language**: 100% Kotlin (no Java)

## Quick Start — Build & Test

```bash
# Android
./gradlew :composeApp:assembleDebug           # Debug APK
./gradlew :composeApp:assembleRelease         # Release APK (needs keystore env vars)

# Desktop
./gradlew :composeApp:desktopJar              # Runnable JAR
./gradlew :composeApp:run                     # Run desktop app

# Tests (100 total: 53 domain + 47 data)
./gradlew :shared:domain:desktopTest          # Domain unit tests
./gradlew :shared:data:desktopTest            # Data integration tests

# Clean
./gradlew clean
```

### Build Status

| Platform | Status | Notes |
|----------|--------|-------|
| Android  | Builds | 22MB APK, targetSdk 35, ProGuard/R8 enabled |
| Desktop  | Builds + Runs | 450x800 window, macOS/Windows/Linux |
| iOS      | Builds + Runs | Tested on iPad, Xcode project in `iosApp/` |
| WasmJs   | Builds | `compileKotlinWasmJs` passes for all modules |

## Architecture

4-layer clean architecture with unidirectional dependency flow:

```
domain  <--  data  <--  presentation  <--  ui
(models,     (SQLDelight, (Decompose       (Compose MP
 repos,       Ktor,        components,      screens,
 use cases)   Koin DI)     navigation)      Material 3)
```

### Module Dependency Graph

```
composeApp (platform entry points)
  └── shared:ui (Compose screens, theme, localization)
        └── shared:presentation (Decompose components, state)
              └── shared:data (database, network, DI modules)
                    └── shared:domain (pure Kotlin models, interfaces)
```

## Module Guide

### `shared/domain` — Pure Kotlin
Domain models (`Hymn`, `Category`, `UserPreferences`, `HymnLanguage`, `AppTheme`, `DarkModePreference`), repository interfaces (`HymnRepository`, `CategoryRepository`, `PreferencesRepository`, `MediaRepository`), and use cases. No platform dependencies.

### `shared/data` — Platform-Specific Implementations
SQLDelight database (`.sq` files), Ktor HTTP client, multiplatform-settings preferences, repository implementations. Contains `expect/actual` declarations for `DriverFactory`, `BundledDataLoader`, `PlatformMediaPlayer`, `PlatformFileStorage`. Koin `DataModule` and `PlatformDataModule` live here.

### `shared/presentation` — Decompose Navigation
Decompose components managing screen state and navigation. `RootComponent` (stack navigation) and `MainComponent` (bottom tab navigation). Pure Kotlin — no Compose dependency. Koin `PresentationModule` lives here.

### `shared/ui` — Compose Multiplatform
All screens (8), UI components, Material 3 theming, and the `AppStrings` localization system. No platform-specific code.

### `composeApp` — Platform Entry Points
Android `MainActivity`/`ImnuriApplication`, Desktop `Main.kt`, iOS `MainViewController.kt`, WasmJs `Main.kt`. Each bootstraps Koin and creates a `RootComponent`.

### `build-logic` — Convention Plugins

package ml.dannyb.imnuriazsmr.migration

import android.content.Context

/**
 * Handles migration of data from the old Realm-based app to the new KMP/SQLDelight app.
 *
 * Migrates from old SharedPreferences (PreferenceManager default prefs):
 * - hymns_language, app_language, night_mode, current_theme, hymn_font_size
 *
 * Limitations:
 * - Favorites were stored ONLY in Realm (not SharedPreferences). Since we do not add
 *   Realm as a dependency, favorites cannot be migrated automatically. Users will need
 *   to re-mark their favorites in the new app.
 */
class LegacyDataMigration(private val context: Context) {

    companion object {
        private const val TAG = "LegacyDataMigration"
        private const val MIGRATION_PREFS = "legacy_migration"
        private const val KEY_MIGRATION_COMPLETE = "migration_complete"

        // Old app SharedPreferences keys (from old PreferencesController.kt)
        private const val OLD_KEY_HYMNS_LANGUAGE = "hymns_language"
        private const val OLD_KEY_APP_LANGUAGE = "app_language"
        private const val OLD_KEY_NIGHT_MODE = "night_mode"
        private const val OLD_KEY_CURRENT_THEME = "current_theme"
        private const val OLD_KEY_HYMN_FONT_SIZE = "hymn_font_size"
        private const val OLD_KEY_DATABASE_POPULATED = "database_populated"

        /**
         * Maps old theme string names to new AppTheme values.
         *
         * Old themes (stored as "AppTheme.{Name}" or "DarkTheme"):
         *   DarkTheme, AppTheme.Transparent, AppTheme.Red, AppTheme.Pink,
         *   AppTheme.Purple, AppTheme.DeepPurple, AppTheme.Indigo, AppTheme.LightBlue,
         *   AppTheme.Blue, AppTheme.Cyan, AppTheme.Teal, AppTheme.Green,
         *   AppTheme.LightGreen, AppTheme.Lime, AppTheme.Yellow, AppTheme.Amber,
         *   AppTheme.Orange, AppTheme.DeepOrange, AppTheme.Brown, AppTheme.Gray,
         *   AppTheme.BlueGrey
         *
         * New themes (8):
         *   SACRED_BLUE, ROYAL_PURPLE, FOREST_GREEN, WARM_AMBER, ROSE, SLATE, EARTH, MIDNIGHT
         */
        fun mapOldThemeToNew(oldTheme: String): AppTheme = when (oldTheme) {
            "AppTheme.Blue", "AppTheme.LightBlue", "AppTheme.Indigo" -> AppTheme.SACRED_BLUE
            "AppTheme.Purple", "AppTheme.DeepPurple" -> AppTheme.ROYAL_PURPLE
            "AppTheme.Green", "AppTheme.LightGreen", "AppTheme.Teal",
            "AppTheme.Lime", "AppTheme.Cyan" -> AppTheme.FOREST_GREEN
            "AppTheme.Yellow", "AppTheme.Amber", "AppTheme.Orange" -> AppTheme.WARM_AMBER
            "AppTheme.Red", "AppTheme.Pink", "AppTheme.DeepOrange" -> AppTheme.ROSE
            "AppTheme.Gray", "AppTheme.BlueGrey", "AppTheme.Transparent" -> AppTheme.SLATE
            "AppTheme.Brown" -> AppTheme.EARTH
            "DarkTheme" -> AppTheme.MIDNIGHT
            else -> AppTheme.DEFAULT
        }
    }

    private val migrationPrefs: SharedPreferences =
        context.getSharedPreferences(MIGRATION_PREFS, Context.MODE_PRIVATE)

    /**
     * Checks whether legacy data migration should run.
     * Returns true if:
     * - Migration has not been completed yet, AND
     * - Old SharedPreferences contain the "database_populated" key (indicating the old app was used)
     */
    fun shouldMigrate(): Boolean {
        if (migrationPrefs.getBoolean(KEY_MIGRATION_COMPLETE, false)) {
            return false
        }
        val oldPrefs = getOldPreferences()
        return oldPrefs.contains(OLD_KEY_DATABASE_POPULATED)

package ml.dannyb.imnuriazsmr.analytics

import com.google.firebase.analytics.FirebaseAnalytics
import com.google.firebase.analytics.ktx.logEvent
import com.google.firebase.crashlytics.FirebaseCrashlytics
import ml.dannyb.imnuriazsmr.domain.analytics.AnalyticsService

class FirebaseAnalyticsService(
    private val firebaseAnalytics: FirebaseAnalytics,
    private val crashlytics: FirebaseCrashlytics
) : AnalyticsService {

    override fun logEvent(name: String, params: Map<String, Any>) {
        firebaseAnalytics.logEvent(name) {
            params.forEach { (key, value) ->
                when (value) {
                    is String -> param(key, value)
                    is Int -> param(key, value.toLong())
                    is Long -> param(key, value)
                    is Double -> param(key, value)
                    is Boolean -> param(key, value.toString())
                    else -> param(key, value.toString())
                }
            }
        }
    }

    override fun setUserId(id: String?) {
        firebaseAnalytics.setUserId(id)
        crashlytics.setUserId(id ?: "")
    }

    override fun setUserProperty(name: String, value: String?) {
        firebaseAnalytics.setUserProperty(name, value)
        crashlytics.setCustomKey(name, value ?: "")
    }
}
